title: Freshdesk Agent Analyzer
description: Evaluate a customer support agent's performance across six dimensions based on a full conversation transcript, with explicit handling for merged-ticket context.

analysis_context.description: Context flags that help interpret the scores.

ticket_was_merged.description: True when the transcript explicitly indicates this ticket was merged into another ticket or thread.

merge_only_interaction.description: True when the transcript is mostly merge/system-routing activity with little or no agent-customer handling to evaluate.

problem_resolution.description: Was the customer's actual issue identified and resolved? Were there unresolved questions or assumptions made?

score.description: 1 = issue not resolved or badly misunderstood, 5 = fully resolved with no loose ends

feedback.description: Required when score is 3 or below. 1-5 sentences explaining the issue with context. Omit or set to null if score is 4 or 5.

tone_and_empathy.description: Did the agent acknowledge the customer's emotions? Was the tone appropriately warm, professional, and matched to the situation?

score.description: 1 = cold, dismissive, or inappropriate tone, 5 = consistently warm, empathetic, and well-matched to the situation

feedback.description: Required when score is 3 or below. 1-5 sentences explaining the issue with context. Omit or set to null if score is 4 or 5.

clarity_and_communication.description: Was the response easy to understand? Any jargon, ambiguity, or unnecessary complexity? Was the length appropriate?

score.description: 1 = confusing, jargon-heavy, or poorly structured, 5 = clear, concise, and well-structured throughout

feedback.description: Required when score is 3 or below. 1-5 sentences explaining the issue with context. Omit or set to null if score is 4 or 5.

efficiency.description: Could the issue have been resolved in fewer turns? Were unnecessary questions asked or steps repeated?

score.description: 1 = significantly drawn out with redundant steps, 5 = resolved as quickly and directly as possible

feedback.description: Required when score is 3 or below. 1-5 sentences explaining the issue with context. Omit or set to null if score is 4 or 5.

proactivity.description: Did the agent anticipate follow-up questions, offer relevant context, or take steps to prevent future issues?

score.description: 1 = purely reactive with no anticipation of needs, 5 = consistently anticipated needs and added meaningful value

feedback.description: Required when score is 3 or below. 1-5 sentences explaining the issue with context. Omit or set to null if score is 4 or 5.

accuracy.description: Was the information provided by the agent correct and complete?

score.description: 1 = significant errors or missing critical information, 5 = all information was correct and complete

feedback.description: Required when score is 3 or below. 1-5 sentences explaining the issue with context. Omit or set to null if score is 4 or 5.

overall_score.description: A holistic overall score for the interaction. Not a simple average — weight problem resolution and accuracy heavily.

overall_summary.description: 2-4 sentence summary of the interaction's strengths and weaknesses. Always required.
